scenario.name: UAC — Outbound INVITE call
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[key_to_user]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:sipp@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[key_to_user]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=sipp 1 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=SIPp Call c=IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 6000 RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:[key_to_user]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:sipp@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[key_to_user]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[key_to_user]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:sipp@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[key_to_user]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Contact: <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
